about.title: About Me
about.text: Reliable engineer specializing in automation, robotics, and model-based systems engineering (MBSE). With experience at BSH, BMW, and Volkswagen, I combine systemic thinking with practical implementation skills.

bsh.title: BSH Test System
bsh.long: Developed a robotic testing system for fully automated washing machine validation. Integrated computer vision for 'END' detection, automated gripper movement, and path planning. Over 80% test cases are handled without human intervention.

vw.title: VW / ITDF Virtual Factory
vw.long: Simulated and optimized Volkswagen production layouts using Tecnomatix Plant Simulation. Built digital twins for multiple automation stations, improving production efficiency by more than 20%.

bmw.title: BMW SDOS
bmw.desc: MBSE safety system to prevent dooring accidents
bmw.long: Designed a Safe Door Opening System for BMW i3 using MBSE and SysML modeling in Cameo. Prevents cycling accidents through early system warning logic and hazard analysis.

pmf.title: PMF UR10e Module
pmf.long: Created a flexible rotary end-effector module for the UR10e robot. Combines vacuum gripper with passive rotation joint to minimize disturbance forces during bin-picking tasks.

bach.title: Bachelor Thesis
bach.desc: Robotic loading concept for CNC machines
bach.long: Developed a modular robotic program framework to enable automated CNC machine loading/unloading. Implemented at Anton Häring KG with station-based logic and collision avoidance.
